guidance: Teach ONE specific, actionable tactic they can do this week to make more money. Real steps, scripts, or settings — worth paying for.
evidence_note: Tactics must be logically airtight and actually executable as described.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Education / Informative' was the most under-served eligible category (target 15%, recent 10%).
post_rationale: Fills an uncovered CRM-operations gap (team bystander effect on shared leads) with a concrete auto-assign-and-escalate rule, using the reel format research shows still wins reach for cold-audience teaching content.

guidance: State a sharp, defensible point of view or contrarian take on how service businesses actually grow. Confident, specific, never gimmicky engagement-bait.
evidence_note: Framed clearly as Black Arrow's view; no fabricated proof.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Contrarian / Brand Point of View' was the most under-served eligible category (target 5%, recent 3%).
post_rationale: Fills the under-served Contrarian/Brand POV category with a sharp, unclaimed reframe (craftsmanship/reputation isn't the deciding edge, response speed is), and reels still carry the strongest reach plus the top-weighted 2026 DM-share signal for this kind of point-of-view content.

guidance: Feature ONE specific free tool actually published at blackarrow.ltd/tools (a calculator, an audit, an AI builder, or Black Arrow OS — the free pocket CRM). Everything on that page is free value used as a lead magnet. Lead with what the tool tells or gives the owner, cite its stated value where the site shows one, and end with the TOOLS keyword CTA. Rotate through the tools; never feature the same one twice in a row.
evidence_note: Only describe tools/offers actually published on the Black Arrow site.
reason: Balancing the mix: 'Offers / Lead Magnets' was the most under-served eligible category (target 22%, recent 20%).
post_rationale: Offers/Lead Magnets is under-served this cycle, and the Ad ROI Calculator is the one published free tool this account hasn't solo-featured yet, using the image-promo format that converts fastest for a single clear offer.
